objective: Certified triage for combinatorial perturbation screens. Given measured single-gene perturbation effects, (a) rank which unmeasured combinations are most likely EMERGENT (produce a transcriptomic state outside the non-negative cone the singles can additively reach) so a screener can triage which to run, and (b) for measured combinations, emit a fail-closed, model-relative separator certifying the unreachable direction together with a measurement-noise test (bootstrap CI + noise-injection p-value) so a low signal-to-noise residual is never mistaken for biology. Built on the same fail-closed cone geometry and adversarial evaluation harness; the Zhu Th2->Th1 single-target analysis is a proving-ground case study for the geometry, not the headline claim.
claim_boundary: Retrospective, donor-collapsed, model-relative directional evidence; not calibrated biological reachability, state conversion, target validation, donor generalization, predictive superiority, prospective library design, or intervention efficacy. Combinatorial emergence is model-relative unreachability from the supplied single-gene cone, not biological impossibility or validated synergy; prospective triage is a modest rank enrichment (2.4x over base rate vs the raw label, 1.4x vs the noise-robust label on one screen), not a solved prediction; the cone's raw ranking is not superior to a learned additive baseline (Spearman 0.98) and only the noise-aware verdict escapes the effect-size confound.

dataset_context.system: donor-collapsed primary human CD4 perturbation-condition profiles
dataset_context.target: source-study-reused, selectively constructed cross-sectional population contrast oriented toward the reported Th1 centroid; neither independent nor a trajectory

combinatorial_triage.dataset: Norman combinatorial CRISPRa screen (distributed file label cell_type=A549; canonical Norman 2019 is K562 — reported as file-label A549, no cell-line claim made)

signal_to_noise_confound.interpretation: Raw normalized residual is confounded by effect magnitude: low-magnitude doubles show inflated residuals from measurement noise. This is the trap the noise test exists to catch; do NOT rank on raw unreachable_fraction alone.

noise_aware_certificate.null: reachable target f0=project_cone(singles,target).fitted + per-gene N(0,SE); SE=|t1-t2|/2 from a random cell split-half; B=200 draws; conservative plus-one empirical p
noise_aware_certificate.two_bars_note: bar (a) noise-injection p<0.05 (129/131) and bar (b) residual >= 1.9x its own noise floor (35/131) are DIFFERENT, increasingly strict tests; always state which is meant.
noise_aware_certificate.per_pair_note: BCL2L11+BAK1 passes bar (a) weakly (z=2.9, p=0.005) but not bar (b); KIF18B+KIF2C is the one raw-top headliner that is NOT significant (z=1.6, p=0.055). Do not give two pairs a shared significance label.

analytic_closed_form_null.method: reachability.analytic_anisotropy_null: closed-form generalized chi-square null for the emergence residual. Near the reachable projection f0, the null residual is ||(I-P)eps||/||f0|| with P the whitened active-atom-facet projector and eps~N(0,diag(SE^2)); Q=||(I-P)eps||^2 is a generalized chi-square with exact E[Q]=tr((I-P)D), Var[Q]=2 tr(((I-P)D)^2), matched to a Satterthwaite gamma. Deterministic, seed-free, no re-solves.
analytic_closed_form_null.anisotropy: Per-gene noise anisotropy enters exactly via tr(PD) (noise-weighted facet leverage); a scalar-SE approximation cannot see it. Across all 289 doubles the isotropic RMS-SE approximation to the null mean is small on these screens (Norman median 1.7%, max 4.2%; CaRPool max 0.6%), so anisotropy is a correctness guarantee rather than a large empirical mover here; a synthetic fixture with atom support aligned to high-noise genes reaches ~11% isotropic error.
analytic_closed_form_null.conservative_direction: The active-atom subspace is locally inside the cone, so the analytic null residual >= the Monte-Carlo null residual: the fast path can only withhold a certificate, never inflate one. Directional/empirical, not a strict pointwise theorem (in general position the two coincide up to Monte-Carlo error).

fragility_diagnostic.claim: The analytic-vs-Monte-Carlo null gap is a certificate-fragility score computable from pure geometry: large for low-SNR (fragile) certificates, negligible for robust ones.

gap_vs_active_set_churn_spearman.note: not significant; churn does NOT drive the gap

fragility_diagnostic.self_reporting: Gap is predictable from analytic-only floor_ratio (Spearman -0.57 Norman / -0.82 CaRPool), so the deterministic path flags its own borderline cases without running Monte-Carlo.
fragility_diagnostic.decision_safety: All 14 certificates the analytic path withheld relative to Monte-Carlo (6 Norman + 8 CaRPool) had Monte-Carlo floor_ratio in [1.90, 1.97] - it diverges only at the 1.9x bar, never on a robust certificate.

synergy_recovery.interpretation: Unreachability recovers classic non-additivity and survives control for effect size — the synergy signal is real, not only a magnitude artifact.

head_to_head_baselines.interpretation: On raw ranking the cone residual is not superior to a learned additive baseline (rho 0.98) or the additive null (rho 0.74). ALL raw rankers are confounded by effect magnitude (-0.47..-0.59); only the noise-aware cone_z escapes (+0.14). The certificate's value is the fail-closed separator and the noise-calibrated verdict, not raw ranking accuracy.

prospective_triage.default_score: minus cosine between the two single-gene effect vectors (training-free)
prospective_triage.interpretation: Emergence is predictable from singles only, enabling a pre-screen before spending combinatorial wells. Modest but significant; a labeled pilot enables the learned model for the noise-robust target.

cross_modality.second_modality: Replogle K562 essential-gene CRISPRi (loss-of-function), 1087 single-gene atoms, leave-one-out reachability spectrum
cross_modality.boundary: Replogle has no measured doubles: this is a geometry-transfer demonstration, NOT a second double-emergence benchmark. The signal-to-noise confound is present in CRISPRi too, so the noise test is required in both modalities.

combinatorial_triage.interpretation: Model-relative combinatorial-emergence triage; a ranked hypothesis generator with a fail-closed certificate and a measurement-noise test, not target validation, dosing, or intervention efficacy.

source_bound_alignment.interpretation: Split variability only; random-gene splits are correlated and do not quantify donor uncertainty.

cross_source_directional_transfer.interpretation: Directional construction-sensitivity diagnostic only; magnitude calibration and stronger baseline superiority are not supported.

donor_pair_transfer.interpretation: Frozen-weight donor-pair plus target-source transfer retains only weak directional gain and fails magnitude calibration. Released H5MU presence is DE-eligibility selected, modalities are two-donor summaries, and four donors support fixed-cohort robustness only.

guide_position_transfer.benchmark_role: negative released first/second guide-rank reciprocal-transfer stress
guide_position_transfer.official_modality_mapping: guide_1 is the lowest alphanumeric sgRNA ID and guide_2 the second within each perturbed-gene/culture-condition pair; targets with one passing guide appear only in guide_1
guide_position_transfer.h5mu_identity_field_status: no guide ID or sequence field is embedded in the guide-level H5MU
guide_position_transfer.identity_crosswalk_status: exact ranked-modality-to-sgRNA IDs not reconstructed or hash-verified in this benchmark
guide_position_transfer.claim_boundary: same-study reciprocal robustness across the released guide_1 and guide_2 alphanumeric guide-rank modalities under the authors' effectiveness-selected DE pipeline; not leakage-safe physical-guide generalization, named-sgRNA replication, donor-population inference, predictive utility, or state reachability
guide_position_transfer.interpretation: The cone's within-rank held-gene alignment does not survive reciprocal guide-rank transfer: same-source median cosine falls from 0.251 to -0.019 (median paired change -0.291), with positive gain over the training-selected best single in 3/12 rows and normalized-RMSE gain in 0/12. Joint target-source transfer is likewise negative. This fixed descriptive benchmark therefore does not demonstrate reciprocal-rank robustness. The H5MU does not embed the ranked sgRNA IDs, this benchmark has not cross-verified the exact ID mapping against public identity-bearing artifacts, and effectiveness-selected inclusion prevents a leakage-safe physical-guide generalization claim.

activation_score_robustness.interpretation: Exact reproduction and within-object descriptive concordance in the authors' preselected 28-regulator panel, with guide heterogeneity; not genome-wide generality, independent replication, donor-population inference, functional activation, or state validation.

arce_external_validation.interpretation: Modest S1 cross-study/cross-modality ranking alignment plus S14 donor/guide robustness for a supplied, incompletely specified score; not state reachability, donor generalization, or causal validation.

schmidt_external_validation.claim_boundary: Two-fixed-donor, source-selected functional-screen concordance; cross-screen rows jointly change donor plus modality/library or donor plus cytokine/cell-type context. Not transcriptomic reachability, modality or guide-library equivalence, cytokine or cell-type generality, guide-held-out replication, donor-population inference, efficacy, or target recommendation.
schmidt_external_validation.interpretation: Whole-universe same-reagent donor concordance is limited (Spearman 0.135-0.332), and modality-plus-library agreement is near zero (0.020-0.036). Conditional on the training donor's 200 largest absolute effects, same-screen held-donor signed ranks are strongest, joint donor-plus-context transfer is intermediate, and joint donor-plus-modality/library transfer is weaker. This is a correlated descriptive stress test, not an estimate of any isolated axis, population generality, or guide generalization.

zhu_arrayed_followup.interpretation: Source-selected same-study cross-platform replication and cytokine consistency in six follow-up donor labels; unequal coverage and upstream target selection preclude held-out-discovery or donor-population inference, and magnitude calibration is not supported.

filter_sensitivity.conclusion: No declared control-only expression threshold rescues the geometric model; SUV39H1 is already filtered at CPM 5 and 10, so only two target rows are removed there while scoring remains target-disjoint.

additive_residual.definition: measured triple effect minus the unit-coefficient sum of constituent-single effects
additive_residual.causal_interpretation: UNAVAILABLE: residuals cannot distinguish interaction from experiment, control-type, or guide-burden differences.

provenance_limits.metadata_conflict: Donor-1 GEO characteristics say Day18 while titles, paper methods, and pinned author metadata say Day7; the report uses Day7 and makes no duration claim.

goudy_cross_experiment_stress.claim_boundary: Descriptive negative stress test of whether one measured FAS + RC3H1 + SUV39H1 triple is represented by target-matched constituent singles across confounded experimental/control designs.
goudy_cross_experiment_stress.interpretation: Execution succeeds, but the declared geometric model fails. Weak transcriptome alignment, low donor reproducibility, filter sensitivity, and perfect single-versus-triple confounding by experiment, control type, and guide burden make the biological result inconclusive. This is not combination or additivity validation, same-guide matching, an interaction test, donor-population inference, prospective validation, or biological reachability evidence.

library_coverage.description: Split-first catalog bookkeeping over reachability.project_cone: strict point-estimate cone membership, cosine-threshold alignment, simple rays, a signed-span capacity ceiling, and retrospective scoring of supplied, already-measured candidate effects.
library_coverage.reproducibility_boundary: The three pickle-free cache artifacts are rebuilt byte-for-byte by a hash-gated deterministic builder. The registered Norman/Replogle URLs remain mutable and historical S3 versions are not anonymously retrievable, so a durable release archive is still required for manuscript-grade availability.

split_sensitivity.purpose: algorithmic library/row-partition sensitivity over correlated measured effects; not biological sampling uncertainty

library_coverage.synthetic_contract: Data-free tests distinguish strict from thresholded coverage, validate weighted gap normals, enforce nested signed-span/cone/ray capacity, require non-negative realized gains, and keep certificate order separate from realized order.
library_coverage.interpretation: Strict membership is zero in every reference catalog and every one of the 12 sensitivity splits; the 0.5 cosine bar is descriptive alignment, not reachability. The cone beats best-single and common-response rays in every split, while the signed span is uniformly better, exposing the cost of non-negativity. Certificate scores correlate with realized mean-cosine gains (Spearman 0.861-0.921) but match the realized top supplied effect atom in 0/3 audits. Zhu and Replogle remain same-screen compression tests; Norman's full-single reference and 40-gene representative sensitivity designs are retrospective additivity/alignment diagnostics. No candidate is unmeasured, and no result is prospective design or a biological verdict.

retired_provenance.reason: The archived multisplit and shuffle pipeline depended on an unhashed, deleted inputs.npz whose gene order was not preserved. These values are provenance, not current findings.

open_requirements: leakage-safe pseudobulk donor- and guide-held-out evaluation
module/pathway holdouts and calibrated structured nulls
nested PCA, ridge, unconstrained and capacity-matched baselines
same-experiment, guide-burden- and control-matched measured in-domain perturbation combinations
independent whole-state protein, chromatin, function, fitness and durability
